rebuild_manifest.source_file: oncology\gastric_cancer\HER2+胃癌\DESTINY-Gastric03 - Trastuzumab Deruxtecan - Updated results 5.4mg-kg triplet combo (ASCO GI 2025).pdf

v2_sources.title: Updated results from the trastuzumab deruxtecan 5.4 mg/kg triplet combination of DESTINY-Gastric03: first-line T-DXd with fluoropyrimidine and pembrolizumab in advanced or metastatic HER2-positive gastric cancer, gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma, or esophageal adenocarcinoma
v2_sources.citation: Updated results from the trastuzumab deruxtecan 5.4 mg/kg triplet combination of DESTINY-Gastric03: first-line T-DXd with fluoropyrimidine and pembrolizumab in advanced or metastatic HER2-positive gastric cancer, gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma, or esophageal adenocarcinoma. ASCO Gastrointestinal Cancers Symposium 2025. 2025.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: Patients with advanced or metastatic HER2-positive gastric cancer, gastroesophageal junction adenocarcinoma, or esophageal adenocarcinoma

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'T-DXd 6.4 mg/kg with fluoropyrimidine and pembrolizumab demonstrated antitumor activity with confirmed ORR of 53.5% in HER2+ gastric cancer, GEJA, or esophageal adenocarcinoma; however, i
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'T-DXd 6.4 mg/kg with fluoropyrimidine and pembrolizumab demonstrated antitumor activity with confirmed ORR of 53.5% in HER2+ gastric cancer, GEJA, or esophageal adenocarcinoma; however, i

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'At similar median durations of follow-up (6.9 months vs 7.8 months), T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg and reduced-dose fluoropyrimidine with pembrolizumab showed promising early antitumor activity with co
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'At similar median durations of follow-up (6.9 months vs 7.8 months), T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg and reduced-dose fluoropyrimidine with pembrolizumab showed promising early antitumor activity with co

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'In T-DXd 6.4 mg/kg arm, ORR was 55.9% (19/34) in IHC 3+ patients and 44.4% (4/9) in IHC 2+/ISH+ patients; median PFS was 10.3 months', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'In T-DXd 6.4 mg/kg arm, ORR was 55.9% (19/34) in IHC 3+ patients and 44.4% (4/9) in IHC 2+/ISH+ patients; median PFS was 10.3 months', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'In T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg arm, ORR was 73.1% (19/26) in IHC 3+ patients and 83.3% (5/6) in IHC 2+/ISH+ patients; median PFS was 9.8 months', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'In T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg arm, ORR was 73.1% (19/26) in IHC 3+ patients and 83.3% (5/6) in IHC 2+/ISH+ patients; median PFS was 9.8 months', 'page': 1}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Lowering T-DXd dose from 6.4 mg/kg to 5.4 mg/kg and lowering capecitabine starting dose from 1000 mg/m2 to 750 mg/m2 improved tolerability of the triplet combination without decreasing OR
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Lowering T-DXd dose from 6.4 mg/kg to 5.4 mg/kg and lowering capecitabine starting dose from 1000 mg/m2 to 750 mg/m2 improved tolerability of the triplet combination without decreasing OR

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Grade ≥3 adverse events: 88.4% in T-DXd 6.4 mg/kg arm vs 46.9% in T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg arm; serious AEs: 58.1% vs 37.5%; AEs leading to T-DXd discontinuation: 23.3% vs 6.3%', 'page': 1}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Grade ≥3 adverse events: 88.4% in T-DXd 6.4 mg/kg arm vs 46.9% in T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg arm; serious AEs: 58.1% vs 37.5%; AEs leading to T-DXd discontinuation: 23.3% vs 6.3%', 'page': 1}
